evals.prompt: 帮我分析 https://github.com/MINT-SJTU/RoboClaw，写一条中文 X thread。我不是项目作者，只是想负责地分享这个项目，并结合我自己从客厅到开放世界的具身智能 vision。需要配图。
evals.expected_output: Clones or reads the repo, checks GitHub metadata, credits the real project owner, separates repo facts from personal vision, avoids contributor recruitment, drafts a paste-ready Chinese X thread, includes a final-mile posting map with length audit and alt text, and provides or generates GPT Image 2 conceptual image assets with disclosure and images_manifest.json registration.

evals.prompt: I built this repo: https://github.com/example/example-ai-tool. Please write a launch thread for X with image prompts, but don't overclaim maturity. Make it sound like a serious developer shipped it.
evals.expected_output: Uses author/maintainer voice, still verifies repo facts and metadata, separates shipped features from roadmap, drafts a launch-style X thread, includes a clean Ready To Post block, respects that the user asked for prompts rather than actual generated files, and registers prompt-only image entries only because the user chose prompt mode.

evals.prompt: 这个本地目录 /tmp/some-open-source-repo 我想发 X 推荐一下。只要分析项目本身，不要加我的个人 vision。输出要能直接复制发。
evals.expected_output: Reads the local repo, fetches origin metadata if available, produces a concise independent recommendation thread, includes evidence/caveats, avoids unsupported social metrics if unavailable, and gives a copy-paste ready final posting pack.

evals.prompt: 我丢 5 个 GitHub repo 给你，帮我统一治理成可 review 的发 X 候选池。每个 repo 都要有 claims ledger、cross-check review、posting pack 和图片 manifest，所有运行结果落盘但不要进 git。
evals.expected_output: Uses the governed multi-repo run workspace, writes per-repo artifacts under repo-to-x-workspace/runs/<run-id>/repos/<repo-id>/, keeps generated outputs ignored by git, includes governed images_manifest.json entries, treats actual generated images as the default for ready-to-post candidates, runs or references the image asset gate, and explains which repos are ready, need revision, or should be blocked.

evals.prompt: 这个 posting pack 我 review 过了，帮我用 CLI 完全自动发 X thread，第一条也要由 CLI 发，带图片和 alt text。
evals.expected_output: Uses official-api-publish only after explicit approval, explains or uses OAuth2 user credentials with tweet.write/media.write/offline.access, dry-runs first unless --live is approved, posts the first item as a root post and later items as replies, uploads governed images from images_manifest.json, writes x_publish_log.json without tokens, and refuses cookie/session/proxy-based posting.

evals.prompt: 给这个 repo 生成 3 张 image2 配图，不要只是 prompts。
evals.expected_output: Treats image2/配图 as a hard trigger for native image generation, uses imagegen or the available built-in image generation path instead of script-drawn placeholders, stores selected files under the run workspace images/ directory when a path is available, registers them in images_manifest.json with alt text/disclosure/review status, and records prompt_only only when the tool cannot expose a local file.

evals.prompt: colbymchenry/codegraph 帮我做成可直接发 X 的 posting pack。
evals.expected_output: Does not say images were skipped because the user did not explicitly request generated assets. Uses adaptive thread length rather than forcing exactly 8 posts, generates at least one actual image with the native image generation path when available, registers the generated file under images_manifest.json, runs scripts/check_image_assets.py before saying Ready To Post, and only uses prompt-only if the user opted out or the image tool is unavailable.
